brief: Geopolitical tensions rise as the US-Saudi nuclear deal nears sealing, while the Trump administration intensifies immigration enforcement. In health and tech, OpenAI faces a lawsuit over dangerous health advice and a transmissible cancer is discovered in catfish. Research highlights ethical AI for dementia care and interactive tools for learning.
news_summary: The US-Saudi nuclear deal stokes arms race concerns, and Trump pressures immigrants with massive fines. OpenAI is sued for harmful chatbot health advice, and a transmissible cancer spreads in catfish.
papers_summary: Papers explore generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care, interactive visual query tools for logic programming, and rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions rise as the US-Saudi nuclear deal nears sealing, while the Trump administration intensifies immigration enforcement. In health and tech, OpenAI faces a lawsuit over dangerous health advice and a transmissible cancer is discovered in catfish. Research highlights ethical AI for dementia care and interactive tools for learning.
en.news_summary: The US-Saudi nuclear deal stokes arms race concerns, and Trump pressures immigrants with massive fines. OpenAI is sued for harmful chatbot health advice, and a transmissible cancer spreads in catfish.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care, interactive visual query tools for logic programming, and rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation.

zh.brief: 今日新闻涵盖日本职场短裤政策引发性别争议、特朗普诉讼文件被强制公开、金门翔安机场的情感工程、乌克兰军方高层变动，以及英国首相贝安德的着装风格挑战。学术方面暂无中文论文，但国际研究聚焦AI伦理与人机交互。
zh.news_summary: 日本Cool Biz政策鼓励男性穿短裤，却引发女性对‘腿毛骚扰’的不满；特朗普被法官责令交出信托文件；金门居民对翔安机场计划矛盾重重；泽连斯基解除乌军总司令职务；贝安德能否适应唐宁街的正式风格受关注；贝克汉姆持续助力美国足球推广。
zh.papers_summary: 未收录中文论文，但国际arXiv论文探讨了生成式AI在失智症护理中的伦理问题、可视化查询工具、以及AI辅助信息评估的修辞模式。

todays_image.caption: The public domain image of a healthy channel catfish serves as an eerie before-picture to the real-world lake where a strange transmissible cancer now spreads among the fish.
todays_image.source_name: Smithsonian's National Zoo & Conservation Biology Institute
todays_image.title: Channel Catfish
